title: Yusanis's Brand
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Yusanis_Brand.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Bastila Shan]] brandishing Yusanis's Brand]]
'''Yusanis's Brand''' was the [[Echani Ritual Brand]] that the famous [[Echani/Legends|Echani]] [[General/Legends|general]] [[Yusanis]] used. It was particularly effective against [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] fought alongside [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] in the [[Mandalorian Wars]], and used it effectively. It proved to be of little help, however, when he challenged the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] to a duel and was [[Death/Legends|killed]]. Revan later had the opportunity to buy it, at a hefty [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|price]], on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] from the [[Paaerduag]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Mic'tunan'jus Orgu]]. When properly modified, even the [[Star Forge]]'s defense droids stood little chance against this high-quality weapon.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
